title: AIF is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: AIF is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
AIF invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About AIF:
AIF is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIF!
